## Public Interface
- `BacktestRunner` — runs trades through mock adapter
- `MockExchangeAdapter` — simulates fills and slippage
- `createBacktestPipelineDeps(config)` → BacktestCollectors
- `calcFullMetrics(trades)` → FullMetrics
- `runWfo(deps, config)` → WfoResult
- `runParameterSearch(space, runner)` → ParamResult[]
- `runCli()` — CLI entry point
